title: Amendment in Schedule I of NFSA, 2013 dated 30.03.2017
description: Amendment in Schedule I of NFSA, 2013 dated 30.03.2017
text: 1794 GI/2017 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 894] ubZ fnYyh] c`gLifrokj] ekpZ 30] 2017@pS=k 9] 1939 No. 894] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, MARCH 30, 2017/CHAITRA 9, 1939 उपभो᭍ता मामले , खा᳒ और सावᭅजिनक िवतरण मंᮢ ालय (खा᳒ और सावᭅ जिनक िवतरण िवभाग) अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 30 माचᭅ, 2017 का.आ. 1003(अ).—के᭠ᮤीय सरकार,रा᭬ᮝीय खा᳒ सुरᭃा अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 क ा 20) कᳱ अनुसूची I के उपबंधᲂ के अनुसरण मᱶ, भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग- II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक का.आ. 3577 (अ) तारीख 29 नव᭥बर, 2016 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत भारत सरकार के उपभो᭍ता मामले,खा᳒ और सावᭅजिनक िवतरण मंᮢालय के खा᳒ और सावᭅजिनक िवतरण िवभा ग कᳱ अिधसूचना मᱶ एतद᳇ारा िन᭥निलिखत संशोधन करती है, अथाᭅत् :- उ᭍त अिधसूचना मᱶ, “31 माचᭅ, 2017” श᭣दᲂ, अंकᲂ और अᭃरᲂ के ᭭ थान पर “30 जून, 2017” श᭣दᲂ, अंकᲂ और अᭃरᲂ को रखा जाएगा । [फा. सं. 15-8/2014-एनएफएसए] नीला᭥बुज शरण, आᳶथक सलाहकार ᳯट᭡पण : मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग- II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ तारीख 29 नव᭥बर, 2016 मᱶ का.आ. सं᭎यांक 3577(अ) ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई थी। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION (Department of Food and Public Distribution) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30thMarch, 2017 S.O. 1003(E).—In pursuance of the provisions of Schedule I to the National Food Security Act, 2013 (20 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, Department of Food and Public Distribution, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 3577(E), dated the 29th November, 2016, namely:- In the said notification, for the words, figures and letters “the 31st March, 2017”, the words, figures and letters “the 30th June, 2017” shall be substituted. [F. No. 15-8/2014-NFSA] NILAMBUJ SHARAN, Economic Adviser Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 3577(E), dated the 29th November, 2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
